name: Xingzou Temple- Tang
description:
Happy Chinese New Year. We're in the year of the Horse, which is my sign. To celebrate, I figured why not bring the Horse here?

Tang is a creation of Diives, and is part of the Xingzuo Temple series as the respersentation of the horse. She's a quiet, timid, but still a cutie when she wants to be.

Anyway, enjoy!

Second opening is The Spanish one.
creator: Grimj
